message:
fix(cli): Produce JSON errors for validation failures in --json mode

- All validation error exits now use printJsonError() with ErrorCode
- Changed process.exit(1) to process.exitCode = 1; return for programmatic use
- Updated tests to check process.exitCode instead of mocking process.exit
- Affected commands: audit, diary, forget, init, mark, onboard, outcome,
  playbook, similar, undo, why

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
